results.name: Acid
results.desc: When you take the Attack action, you can replace one of your attacks with throwing a vial of Acid. Target one creature or object you can see within 20 feet of yourself. The target must succeed on a Dexterity saving throw (DC 8 plus your Dexterity modifier and Proficiency Bonus) or take 2d6 Acid damage.

results.name: Airship
results.desc: A magical flying vessel capable of air travel.

results.name: Alchemist's Fire
results.desc: When you take the Attack action, you can replace one of your attacks with throwing a flask of Alchemist's Fire. Target one creature or object you can see within 20 feet of yourself. The target must succeed on a Dexterity saving throw (DC 8 plus your Dexterity modifier and Proficiency Bonus) or take 1d4 Fire damage and start burning (see "Rules Glossary").

results.name: Alchemist's Supplies (50 GP)
results.desc: Ability: Intelligence. Utilize: Identify a substance (DC 15), or start a fire (DC 15). Craft: Acid, Alchemist's Fire, Component Pouch, Oil, Paper, Perfume

results.name: Antitoxin
results.desc: As a Bonus Action, you can drink a vial of Antitoxin to gain Advantage on saving throws to avoid or end the Poisoned condition for 1 hour. abo

results.name: Arrows (20)
results.desc: Ammunition for weapons that use arrows. Comes in a pack of 20. Typically stored in a quiver.

results.name: Backpack
results.desc: A Backpack holds up to 30 pounds within 1 cubic foot. It can also serve as a saddlebag.

results.name: Ball Bearings
results.desc: As a Utilize action, you can spill Ball Bearings from their pouch. They spread to cover a level, 10-footsquare area within 10 feet of yourself. A creature that enters this area for the first time on a turn must succeed on a DC 10 Dexterity saving throw or have the Prone condition. It takes 10 minutes to recover the Ball Bearings.

results.name: Barrel
results.desc: A Barrel holds up to 40 gallons of liquid or up to 4 cubic feet of dry goods.

results.name: Basket
results.desc: A Basket holds up to 40 pounds within 2 cubic feet.

results.name: Battleaxe
results.desc: A battleaxe.

property.name: Topple
property.desc: If you hit a creature with this weapon, you can force the creature to make a Constitution saving throw (DC 8 plus the ability modifier used to make the attack roll and your Proficiency Bonus). On a failed save, the creature has the Prone condition.

property.name: Versatile
property.desc: A Versatile weapon can be used with one or two hands. A damage value in parentheses appears with the property. The weapon deals that damage when used with two hands to make a melee attack.

results.name: Bedroll
results.desc: A Bedroll sleeps one Small or Medium creature. While in a Bedroll, you automatically succeed on saving throws against extreme cold (see "Gameplay Toolbox").

results.name: Bell
results.desc: When rung as a Utilize action, a Bell produces a sound that can be heard up to 60 feet away.

results.name: Blanket
results.desc: While wrapped in a blanket, you have Advantage on saving throws against extreme cold (see "Gameplay Toolbox").

results.name: Block and Tackle
results.desc: A Block and Tackle allows you to hoist up to four times the weight you can normally lift.

results.name: Blowgun
results.desc: A blowgun.

property.name: Ammunition
property.desc: You can use a weapon that has the Ammunition property to make a ranged attack only if you have ammunition to fire from it. The type of ammunition required is specified with the weapon's range. Each attack expends one piece of ammunition. Drawing the ammunition is part of the attack (you need a free hand to load a one-handed weapon). After a fight, you can spend 1 minute to recover half the ammunition (round down) you used in the fight; the rest is lost.

property.name: Loading
property.desc: You can fire only one piece of ammunition from a Loading weapon when you use an action, a Bonus Action, or a Reaction to fire it, regardless of the number of attacks you can normally make.

property.name: Vex
property.desc: If you hit a creature with this weapon and deal damage to the creature, you have Advantage on your next attack roll against that creature before the end of your next turn.

results.name: Bolts (20)
results.desc: Ammunition for weapons that use bolts. Comes in a pack of 20. Typically stored in a case.

results.name: Book
results.desc: A Book contains fiction or nonfiction. If you consult an accurate nonfiction Book about its topic, you gain a +5 bonus to Intelligence (Arcana, History, Nature, or Religion) checks you make about that topic.

results.name: Bottle, Glass
results.desc: A Glass Bottle holds up to 1 0.5 pints.

results.name: Breastplate
results.desc: A breastplate.

results.name: Brewer's Supplies (20 GP)
results.desc: Ability: Intelligence. Utilize: Detect poisoned drink (DC 15), or identify alcohol (DC 10). Craft: Antitoxin

results.name: Bucket
results.desc: A Bucket holds up to half a cubic foot of contents.

results.name: Bullets, Firearm (10)
results.desc: Ammunition for weapons that use bullets, firearm. Comes in a pack of 10. Typically stored in a pouch.

results.name: Bullets, Sling (20)
results.desc: Ammunition for weapons that use bullets, sling. Comes in a pack of 20. Typically stored in a pouch.

results.name: Burglar's Pack
results.desc: A Burglar's Pack contains the following items: Backpack, Ball Bearings, Bell, 10 Candles, Crowbar, Hooded Lantern, 7 flasks of Oil, 5 days of Rations, Rope, Tinderbox, and Waterskin.

results.name: Calligrapher's Supplies (10 GP)
results.desc: Ability: Dexterity. Utilize: Write text with impressive flourishes that guard against forgery (DC 15). Craft: Ink, *Spell Scroll*

results.name: Caltrops
results.desc: As a Utilize action, you can spread Caltrops from their bag to cover a 5-foot-square area within 5 feet of yourself. A creature that enters this area for the first time on a turn must succeed on a DC 15 Dexterity saving throw or take 1 Piercing damage and have its Speed reduced to 0 until the start of its next turn. It takes 10 minutes to recover the Caltrops.

results.name: Camel
results.desc: A desert-dwelling mount capable of carrying heavy loads.

results.name: Candle
results.desc: For 1 hour, a lit Candle sheds Bright Light in a 5-foot radius and Dim Light for an additional 5 feet.

results.name: Carpenter's Tools (8 GP)
results.desc: Ability: Strength. Utilize: Seal or pry open a door or container (DC 20). Craft: Club, Greatclub, Quarterstaff, Barrel, Chest, Ladder, Pole, Portable Ram, Torch

results.name: Carriage
results.desc: A four-wheeled vehicle pulled by horses, designed for passenger transport.

results.name: Cart
results.desc: A two-wheeled vehicle pulled by a single horse, designed for cargo transport.

results.name: Cartographer's Tools (15 GP)
results.desc: Ability: Wisdom. Utilize: Draft a map of a small area (DC 15). Craft: Map

results.name: Case, Crossbow Bolt
results.desc: A Crossbow Bolt Case holds up to 20 Bolts.

results.name: Case, Map or Scroll
results.desc: A Map or Scroll Case holds up to 10 sheets of paper or 5 sheets of parchment.

results.name: Chain
results.desc: As a Utilize action, you can wrap a Chain around an unwilling creature within 5 feet of yourself that has the Grappled, Incapacitated, or Restrained condition if you succeed on a DC 13 Strength (Athletics) check. If the creature's legs are bound, the creature has the Restrained condition until it escapes. Escaping the Chain requires the creature to make a successful DC 18 Dexterity (Acrobatics) check as an action. Bursting the Chain requires a successful DC 20 Strength (Athletics) check as an action.

results.name: Chain Mail
results.desc: A chain mail.

results.name: Chain Shirt
results.desc: A chain shirt.

results.name: Chariot
results.desc: A two-wheeled vehicle pulled by horses, designed for speed and combat.

results.name: Chest
results.desc: A Chest holds up to 12 cubic feet of contents.

results.name: Climber's Kit
results.desc: A Climber's Kit includes boot tips, gloves, pitons, and a harness. As a Utilize action, you can use the Climber's Kit to anchor yourself; when you do, you can't fall more than 25 feet from the anchor point, and you can't move more than 25 feet from there without undoing the anchor as a Bonus Action.

results.name: Clothes, Fine
results.desc: Fine Clothes are made of expensive fabrics and adorned with expertly crafted details. Some events and locations admit only people wearing these clothes.

results.name: Clothes, Traveler's
results.desc: Traveler's Clothes are resilient garments designed for travel in various environments.

results.name: Club
results.desc: A club.

property.name: Light
property.desc: When you take the Attack action on your turn and attack with a Light weapon, you can make one extra attack as a Bonus Action later on the same turn. That extra attack must be made with a different Light weapon, and you don't add your ability modifier to the extra attack's damage unless that modifier is negative.

property.name: Slow
property.desc: If you hit a creature with this weapon and deal damage to it, you can reduce its Speed by 10 feet until the start of your next turn. If the creature is hit more than once by weapons that have this property, the Speed reduction doesn't exceed 10 feet.

results.name: Cobbler's Tools (5 GP)
results.desc: Ability: Dexterity. Utilize: Modify footwear to give Advantage on the wearer's next Dexterity (Acrobatics) check (DC 10). Craft: Climber's Kit

results.name: Component Pouch
results.desc: A Component Pouch is watertight and filled with compartments that hold all the free Material components of your spells.

results.name: Cook's Utensils (1 GP)
results.desc: Ability: Wisdom. Utilize: Improve food's flavor (DC 10), or detect spoiled or poisoned food (DC 15). Craft: Rations

results.name: Costume
results.desc: While wearing a Costume, you have Advantage on any ability check you make to impersonate the person or type of person it represents.

results.name: Crowbar
results.desc: Using a Crowbar gives you Advantage on Strength checks where the Crowbar's leverage can be applied.

results.name: Dagger
results.desc: A dagger.

property.name: Finesse
property.desc: When making an attack with a Finesse weapon, use your choice of your Strength or Dexterity modifier for the attack and damage rolls. You must use the same modifier for both rolls.

property.name: Light
property.desc: When you take the Attack action on your turn and attack with a Light weapon, you can make one extra attack as a Bonus Action later on the same turn. That extra attack must be made with a different Light weapon, and you don't add your ability modifier to the extra attack's damage unless that modifier is negative.

property.name: Nick
property.desc: When you make the extra attack of the Light property, you can make it as part of the Attack action instead of as a Bonus Action. You can make this extra attack only once per turn.

property.name: Thrown
property.desc: If a weapon has the Thrown property, you can throw the weapon to make a ranged attack, and you can draw that weapon as part of the attack. If the weapon is a Melee weapon, use the same ability modifier for the attack and damage rolls that you use for a melee attack with that weapon.

results.name: Dart
results.desc: A dart.

property.name: Finesse
property.desc: When making an attack with a Finesse weapon, use your choice of your Strength or Dexterity modifier for the attack and damage rolls. You must use the same modifier for both rolls.

property.name: Thrown
property.desc: If a weapon has the Thrown property, you can throw the weapon to make a ranged attack, and you can draw that weapon as part of the attack. If the weapon is a Melee weapon, use the same ability modifier for the attack and damage rolls that you use for a melee attack with that weapon.

property.name: Vex
property.desc: If you hit a creature with this weapon and deal damage to the creature, you have Advantage on your next attack roll against that creature before the end of your next turn.

results.name: Diplomat's Pack
results.desc: A Diplomat's Pack contains the following items: Chest, Fine Clothes, Ink, 5 Ink Pens, Lamp, 2 Map or Scroll Cases, 4 flasks of Oil, 5 sheets of Paper, 5 sheets of Parchment, Perfume, and Tinderbox.

results.name: Disguise Kit
results.desc: Ability: Charisma. Utilize: Apply makeup (DC 10). Craft: Costume

results.name: Druidic Focus, Sprig of Mistletoe
results.desc: A Druidic Focus is carved, tied with ribbon, or painted to channel primal magic. A Druid or Ranger can use such an object as a Spellcasting Focus.

results.name: Druidic Focus, Wooden Staff
results.desc: A Druidic Focus is carved, tied with ribbon, or painted to channel primal magic. A Druid or Ranger can use such an object as a Spellcasting Focus. This staff can also be used as a Quarterstaff.

results.name: Druidic Focus, Yew Wand
results.desc: A Druidic Focus is carved, tied with ribbon, or painted to channel primal magic. A Druid or Ranger can use such an object as a Spellcasting Focus.

results.name: Dungeoneer's Pack
results.desc: A Dungeoneer's Pack contains the following items: Backpack, Caltrops, Crowbar, 2 flasks of Oil, 10 days of Rations, Rope, Tinderbox, 10 Torches, and Waterskin.

results.name: Elephant
results.desc: A massive mount capable of carrying extremely heavy loads.

results.name: Entertainer's Pack
results.desc: An Entertainer's Pack contains the following items: Backpack, Bedroll, Bell, Bullseye Lantern, 3 Costumes, Mirror, 8 flasks of Oil, 9 days of Rations, Tinderbox, and Waterskin.

results.name: Explorer's Pack
results.desc: An Explorer's Pack contains the following items: Backpack, Bedroll, 2 flasks of Oil, 10 days of Rations, Rope, Tinderbox, 10 Torches, and Waterskin.

results.name: Feed (per day)
results.desc: Daily feed for a mount.

results.name: Flail
results.desc: A flail.

property.name: Sap
property.desc: If you hit a creature with this weapon, that creature has Disadvantage on its next attack roll before the start of your next turn.

results.name: Flask
results.desc: A Flask holds up to 1 pint.

results.name: Forgery Kit
results.desc: Ability: Dexterity. Utilize: Mimic 10 or fewer words of someone else's handwriting (DC 15), or duplicate a wax seal (DC 20)

results.name: Galley
results.desc: A large warship propelled by oars and sails.

results.name: Gaming Set, Dice
results.desc: Ability: Wisdom. Utilize: Discern whether someone is cheating (DC 10), or win the game (DC 20)

results.name: Gaming Set, Dragonchess
results.desc: Ability: Intelligence. Utilize: Discern an opponent's mood and intentions (DC 15), or win the game (DC 20)

results.name: Gaming Set, Playing Cards
results.desc: Ability: Charisma. Utilize: Discern an opponent's mood and intentions (DC 15), or win the game (DC 20)

results.name: Gaming Set, Three-Dragon Ante
results.desc: Ability: Charisma. Utilize: Discern an opponent's mood and intentions (DC 15), or win the game (DC 20)

results.name: Glaive
results.desc: A glaive.

property.name: Graze
property.desc: If your attack roll with this weapon misses a creature, you can deal damage to that creature equal to the ability modifier you used to make the attack roll. This damage is the same type dealt by the weapon, and the damage can be increased only by increasing the ability modifier.

property.name: Heavy
property.desc: You have Disadvantage on attack rolls with a Heavy weapon if it's a Melee weapon and your Strength score isn't at least 13 or if it's a Ranged weapon and your Dexterity score isn't at least 13.

property.name: Reach
property.desc: A Reach weapon adds 5 feet to your reach when you attack with it, as well as when determining your reach for Opportunity Attacks with it.

property.name: Two-Handed
property.desc: A Two-Handed weapon requires two hands when you attack with it.

results.name: Glassblower's Tools (30 GP)
results.desc: Ability: Intelligence. Utilize: Discern what a glass object held in the past 24 hours (DC 15). Craft: Glass Bottle, Magnifying Glass, Spyglass, Vial

results.name: Grappling Hook
results.desc: As a Utilize action, you can throw the Grappling Hook at a railing, a ledge, or another catch within 50 feet of yourself, and the hook catches on if you succeed on a DC 13 Dexterity (Acrobatics) check. If you tied a Rope to the hook, you can then climb it.

results.name: Greataxe
results.desc: A greataxe.

property.name: Cleave
property.desc: If you hit a creature with a melee attack roll using this weapon, you can make a melee attack roll with the weapon against a second creature within 5 feet of the first that is also within your reach. On a hit, the second creature takes the weapon's damage, but don't add your ability modifier to that damage unless that modifier is negative. You can make this extra attack only once per turn.

property.name: Heavy
property.desc: You have Disadvantage on attack rolls with a Heavy weapon if it's a Melee weapon and your Strength score isn't at least 13 or if it's a Ranged weapon and your Dexterity score isn't at least 13.

property.name: Two-Handed
property.desc: A Two-Handed weapon requires two hands when you attack with it.

results.desc: A greatclub.

property.name: Push
property.desc: If you hit a creature with this weapon, you can push the creature up to 10 feet straight away from yourself if it is Large or smaller.

property.name: Two-Handed
property.desc: A Two-Handed weapon requires two hands when you attack with it.

results.name: Healer's Kit
results.desc: A Healer's Kit has ten uses. As a Utilize action, you can expend one of its uses to stabilize an Unconscious creature that has 0 Hit Points without needing to make a Wisdom (Medicine) check.

results.name: Heavy Crossbow
results.desc: A heavy crossbow.

The type of ammunition required is specified with the weapon's range. Each attack expends one piece of ammunition. Drawing the ammunition is part of the attack (you need a free hand to load a one-handed weapon). After a fight, you can spend 1 minute to recover half the ammunition (round down) you used in the fight; the rest is lost.

results.name: Herbalism Kit
results.desc: Ability: Intelligence. Utilize: Identify a plant (DC 15). Craft: Antitoxin, Potion of Healing

results.name: Hide Armor
results.desc: A hide armor.

results.name: Holy Symbol, Amulet)
results.desc: A Holy Symbol Amulet is bejeweled or painted to channel divine magic. A Cleric or Paladin can use it as a Spellcasting Focus. It can be worn around the neck or held in hand.

results.name: Holy Symbol, Emblem)
results.desc: A Holy Symbol Emblem is bejeweled or painted to channel divine magic. A Cleric or Paladin can use it as a Spellcasting Focus. It must be borne on fabric (such as a tabard or banner) or a Shield.

results.name: Holy Symbol, Reliquary
results.desc: A Holy Symbol Reliquary is bejeweled or painted to channel divine magic. A Cleric or Paladin can use it as a Spellcasting Focus. It must be held in hand.

results.name: Holy Water
results.desc: When you take the Attack action, you can replace one of your attacks with throwing a flask of Holy Water. Target one creature you can see within 20 feet of yourself. The target must succeed on a Dexterity saving throw (DC 8 plus your Dexterity modifier and Proficiency Bonus) or take 2d8 Radiant damage if it is a Fiend or an Undead.

results.name: Horse (Draft)
results.desc: A strong horse bred for pulling heavy loads.

results.name: Horse (Riding)
results.desc: A horse trained for riding and carrying moderate loads.

results.name: Hunting Trap
results.desc: As a Utilize action, you can set a Hunting Trap, which is a sawtooth steel ring that snaps shut when a creature steps on a pressure plate in the center. The trap is affixed by a heavy chain to an immobile object, such as a tree or a spike driven into the ground. A creature that steps on the plate must succeed on a DC 13 Dexterity saving throw or take 1d4 Piercing damage and have its Speed reduced to 0 until the start of its next turn. Thereafter, until the creature breaks free of the trap, its movement is limited by the length of the chain (typically 3 feet). A creature can use its action to make a DC 13 Strength (Athletics) check, freeing itself or another creature within its reach on a success. Each failed check deals 1 Piercing damage to the trapped creature.

results.name: Ink
results.desc: Ink comes in a 1-ounce bottle, which provides enough ink to write about 500 pages.

results.name: Ink Pen
results.desc: Using Ink, an Ink Pen is used to write or draw.

results.name: Ioun Stone
results.desc: Roughly marble sized, Ioun Stones are named after Ioun, a god of knowledge and prophecy revered on some worlds. Many types of Ioun Stones exist, each type a distinct combination of shape and color. When you take a Magic action to toss an Ioun Stone into the air, the stone orbits your head at a distance of 1d3 feet, conferring its benefit to you while doing so. You can have up to three Ioun Stones orbiting your head at the same time. Each Ioun Stone orbiting your head is considered to be an object you are wearing. The orbiting stone avoids contact with other creatures and objects, adjusting its orbit to avoid collisions and thwarting all attempts by other creatures to attack or snatch it. As a Utilize action, you can seize and stow any number of Ioun Stones orbiting your head. If your Attunement to an Ioun Stone ends while it's orbiting your head, the stone falls as though you had dropped it. The type of stone determines its rarity and effects. Absorption (Very Rare). While this pale lavender ellipsoid orbits your head, you can take a Reaction to cancel a spell of level 4 or lower cast by a creature you can see. A canceled spell has no effect, and any resources used to cast it are wasted. Once the stone has canceled 20 levels of spells, it burns out, turns dull gray, and loses its magic. Agility (Very Rare). Your Dexterity increases by 2, to a maximum of 20, while this deep-red sphere orbits your head. Awareness (Rare). While this dark-blue rhomboid orbits your head, you have Advantage on Initiative rolls and Wisdom (Perception) checks. Fortitude (Very Rare). Your Constitution increases by 2, to a maximum of 20, while this pink rhomboid orbits your head. Greater Absorption (Legendary). While this marbled lavender and green ellipsoid orbits your head, you can take a Reaction to cancel a spell of level 8 or lower cast by a creature you can see. A canceled spell has no effect, and any resources used to cast it are wasted. Once the stone has canceled 20 levels of spells, it burns out, turns dull gray, and loses its magic. Insight (Very Rare). Your Wisdom increases by 2, to a maximum of 20, while this incandescent blue sphere orbits your head. Intellect (Very Rare). Your Intelligence increases by 2, to a maximum of 20, while this marbled scarlet and blue sphere orbits your head. Leadership (Very Rare). Your Charisma increases by 2, to a maximum of 20, while this marbled pink and green sphere orbits your head. Mastery (Legendary). Your Proficiency Bonus increases by 1 while this pale green prism orbits your head. Protection (Rare). You gain a +1 bonus to Armor Class while this dusty-rose prism orbits your head. Regeneration (Legendary). You regain 15 Hit Points at the end of each hour this pearly white spindle orbits your head if you have at least 1 Hit Point. Reserve (Rare). This vibrant purple prism stores spells cast into it, holding them until you use them. The stone can store up to 4 levels of spells at a time. When found, it contains 1d4 levels of stored spells chosen by the GM. Any creature can cast a spell of level 1 through 4 into the stone by touching it as the spell is cast. The spell has no effect, other than to be stored in the stone. If the stone can't hold the spell, the spell is expended without effect. The level of the slot used to cast the spell determines how much space it uses. While this stone orbits your head, you can cast any spell stored in it. The spell uses the slot level, spell save DC, spell attack bonus, and spellcasting ability of the original caster but is otherwise treated as if you cast the spell. The spell cast from the stone is no longer stored in it, freeing up space. Strength (Very Rare). Your Strength increases by 2, to a maximum of 20, while this pale blue rhomboid orbits your head. Sustenance (Rare). You don't need to eat or drink while this clear spindle orbits your head.

results.name: Javelin
results.desc: A javelin.

results.name: Jug
results.desc: A Jug holds up to 1 gallon.

results.name: Keelboat

results.name: Ladder
results.desc: A Ladder is 10 feet tall. You must climb to move up or down it.

results.name: Lamp

results.name: Lance
results.desc: A lance.

property.name: Heavy
property.desc: You have Disadvantage on attack rolls with a Heavy weapon if it's a Melee weapon and your Strength score isn't at least 13 or if it's a Ranged weapon and your Dexterity score isn't at least 13.

property.name: Reach
property.desc: A Reach weapon adds 5 feet to your reach when you attack with it, as well as when determining your reach for Opportunity Attacks with it.

property.name: Topple
property.desc: If you hit a creature with this weapon, you can force the creature to make a Constitution saving throw (DC 8 plus the ability modifier used to make the attack roll and your Proficiency Bonus). On a failed save, the creature has the Prone condition.

property.name: Two-Handed
property.desc: A Two-Handed weapon requires two hands when you attack with it.

results.name: Lantern, Bullseye
results.desc: A Bullseye Lantern burns Oil as fuel to cast Bright Light in a 60-foot Cone and Dim Light for an additional 60 feet.

results.name: Lantern, Hooded
results.desc: A Hooded Lantern burns Oil as fuel to cast Bright Light in a 30-foot radius and Dim Light for an additional 30 feet. As a Bonus Action, you can lower the hood, reducing the light to Dim Light in a 5-foot radius, or raise it again.

results.name: Leather Armor
results.desc: A leather armor.

results.name: Leatherworker's Tools (5 GP)
results.desc: Ability: Dexterity. Utilize: Add a design to a leather item (DC 10). Craft: Sling, Whip, Hide Armor, Leather Armor, Studded Leather Armor, Backpack, Crossbow Bolt Case, Map or Scroll Case, Parchment, Pouch, Quiver, Waterskin

results.name: Light Crossbow
results.desc: A light crossbow.

property.name: Ammunition
property.desc: You can use a weapon that has the Ammunition property to make a ranged attack only if you have ammunition to fire from it. The type of ammunition required is specified with the weapon's range. Each attack expends one piece of ammunition. Drawing the ammunition is part of the attack (you need a free hand to load a one-handed weapon). After a fight, you can spend 1 minute to recover half the ammunition (round down) you used in the fight; the rest is lost.

property.name: Loading
property.desc: You can fire only one piece of ammunition from a Loading weapon when you use an action, a Bonus Action, or a Reaction to fire it, regardless of the number of attacks you can normally make.

property.name: Slow
property.desc: If you hit a creature with this weapon and deal damage to it, you can reduce its Speed by 10 feet until the start of your next turn. If the creature is hit more than once by weapons that have this property, the Speed reduction doesn't exceed 10 feet.

property.name: Two-Handed
property.desc: A Two-Handed weapon requires two hands when you attack with it.

results.name: Light Hammer
results.desc: A light hammer.

property.name: Light
property.desc: When you take the Attack action on your turn and attack with a Light weapon, you can make one extra attack as a Bonus Action later on the same turn. That extra attack must be made with a different Light weapon, and you don't add your ability modifier to the extra attack's damage unless that modifier is negative.

property.name: Nick
property.desc: When you make the extra attack of the Light property, you can make it as part of the Attack action instead of as a Bonus Action. You can make this extra attack only once per turn.

property.name: Thrown
property.desc: If a weapon has the Thrown property, you can throw the weapon to make a ranged attack, and you can draw that weapon as part of the attack. If the weapon is a Melee weapon, use the same ability modifier for the attack and damage rolls that you use for a melee attack with that weapon.

results.name: Lock
results.desc: A Lock comes with a key. Without the key, a creature can use Thieves' Tools to pick this Lock with a successful DC 15 Dexterity (Sleight of Hand) check.

results.name: Longbow
results.desc: A longbow.

property.name: Ammunition
property.desc: You can use a weapon that has the Ammunition property to make a ranged attack only if you have ammunition to fire from it. The type of ammunition required is specified with the weapon's range. Each attack expends one piece of ammunition. Drawing the ammunition is part of the attack (you need a free hand to load a one-handed weapon). After a fight, you can spend 1 minute to recover half the ammunition (round down) you used in the fight; the rest is lost.

property.name: Heavy
property.desc: You have Disadvantage on attack rolls with a Heavy weapon if it's a Melee weapon and your Strength score isn't at least 13 or if it's a Ranged weapon and your Dexterity score isn't at least 13.

property.name: Slow
property.desc: If you hit a creature with this weapon and deal damage to it, you can reduce its Speed by 10 feet until the start of your next turn. If the creature is hit more than once by weapons that have this property, the Speed reduction doesn't exceed 10 feet.

property.name: Two-Handed
property.desc: A Two-Handed weapon requires two hands when you attack with it.

results.name: Longship
results.desc: A swift ship designed for raiding and exploration.

results.name: Longsword
results.desc: A longsword.

property.name: Sap
property.desc: If you hit a creature with this weapon, that creature has Disadvantage on its next attack roll before the start of your next turn.

property.name: Versatile
property.desc: A Versatile weapon can be used with one or two hands. A damage value in parentheses appears with the property. The weapon deals that damage when used with two hands to make a melee attack.

results.name: Mace
results.desc: A mace.

property.name: Sap
property.desc: If you hit a creature with this weapon, that creature has Disadvantage on its next attack roll before the start of your next turn.

results.name: Magnifying Glass
results.desc: A Magnifying Glass grants Advantage on any ability check made to appraise or inspect a highly detailed item. Lighting a fire with a Magnifying Glass requires light as bright as sunlight to focus, tinder to ignite, and about 5 minutes for the fire to ignite.

results.name: Manacles
results.desc: As a Utilize action, you can use Manacles to bind an unwilling Small or Medium creature within 5 feet of yourself that has the Grappled, Incapacitated, or Restrained condition if you succeed on a DC 13 Dexterity (Sleight of Hand) check. While bound, a creature has Disadvantage on attack rolls, and the creature is Restrained if the Manacles are attached to a chain or hook that is fixed in place. Escaping the Manacles requires a successful DC 20 Dexterity (Sleight of Hand) check as an action. Bursting them requires a successful DC 25 Strength (Athletics) check as an action. Each set of Manacles comes with a key. Without the key, a creature can use Thieves' Tools to pick the Manacles' lock with a successful DC 15 Dexterity (Sleight of Hand) check.

results.name: Map
results.desc: If you consult an accurate Map, you gain a +5 bonus to Wisdom (Survival) checks you make to find your way in the place represented on it.

results.name: Mason's Tools (10 GP)
results.desc: Ability: Strength. Utilize: Chisel a symbol or hole in stone (DC 10). Craft: Block and Tackle

results.name: Mastiff
results.desc: A large dog trained for combat and carrying small loads.

results.name: Maul
results.desc: A maul.

property.name: Two-Handed

results.name: Mirror
results.desc: A handheld steel Mirror is useful for personal cosmetics but also for peeking around corners and reflecting light as a signal.

results.name: Morningstar

property.name: Sap
property.desc: If you hit a creature with this weapon, that creature has Disadvantage on its next attack roll before the start of your next turn.

results.name: Mule
results.desc: A sturdy mount known for its reliability and carrying capacity.

Drawing the ammunition is part of the attack (you need a free hand to load a one-handed weapon). property.name: Loading

property.name: Slow

results.name: Navigator's Tools
results.desc: Ability: Wisdom. Utilize: Plot a course (DC 15), or determine position (DC 15)

results.name: Needles (50)
results.desc: Ammunition for weapons that use needles. Comes in a pack of 50. Typically stored in a pouch.

results.name: Net
results.desc: When you take the Attack action, you can replace one of your attacks with throwing a Net. Target a creature you can see within 15 feet of yourself. The target must succeed on a Dexterity saving throw (DC 8 plus your Dexterity modifier and Proficiency Bonus) or have the Restrained condition until it escapes. The target succeeds automatically if it is Huge or larger. To escape, the target or a creature within 5 feet of it must take an action to make a DC 10 Strength (Athletics) check, freeing the Restrained creature on a success. Destroying the Net (AC 10; 5 HP; Immunity to Bludgeoning, Poison, and Psychic damage) also frees the target, ending the effect.

results.name: Oil
results.desc: You can douse a creature, object, or space with Oil or use it as fuel, as detailed below. Dousing a Creature or an Object. When you take the Attack action, you can replace one of your attacks with throwing an Oil flask. Target one creature or object within 20 feet of yourself. The target must succeed on a Dexterity saving throw (DC 8 plus your Dexterity modifier and Proficiency Bonus) or be covered in oil. If the target takes Fire damage before the oil dries (after 1 minute), the target takes an extra 5 Fire damage from burning oil. Dousing a Space. You can take the Utilize action to pour an Oil flask on level ground to cover a 5-foot-square area within 5 feet of yourself. If lit, the oil burns until the end of the turn 2 rounds from when the oil was lit (or 12 seconds) and deals 5 Fire damage to any creature that enters the area or ends its turn there. A creature can take this damage only once per turn. Fuel. Oil serves as fuel for Lamps and Lanterns. Once lit, a flask of Oil burns for 6 hours in a Lamp or Lantern. That duration doesn't need to be consecutive; you can extinguish the burning Oil (as a Utilize action) and rekindle it again until it has burned for a total of 6 hours.

results.name: Padded Armor
results.desc: A padded armor.

results.name: Painter's Supplies (10 GP)
results.desc: Ability: Wisdom. Utilize: Paint a recognizable image of something you've seen (DC 10). Craft: Druidic Focus, Holy Symbol

results.name: Paper
results.desc: One sheet of Paper can hold about 250 handwritten words.

results.name: Parchment
results.desc: One sheet of Parchment can hold about 250 handwritten words.

results.name: Perfume
results.desc: Perfume comes in a 4-ounce vial. For 1 hour after applying Perfume to yourself, you have Advantage on Charisma (Persuasion) checks made to influence an Indifferent Humanoid within 5 feet of yourself.

results.name: Pike
results.desc: A pike.

property.desc: You have Disadvantage on attack rolls with a Heavy weapon if it's a Melee weapon and your Strength score isn't at least 13 or if it's a Ranged weapon and your Dexterity score isn't at least 13.

property.name: Push
property.desc: If you hit a creature with this weapon, you can push the creature up to 10 feet straight away from yourself if it is Large or smaller.

property.name: Reach
property.desc: A Reach weapon adds 5 feet to your reach when you attack with it, as well as when determining your reach for Opportunity Attacks with it.

property.name: Two-Handed
property.desc: A Two-Handed weapon requires two hands when you attack with it.

results.desc: A pistol.

Drawing the ammunition is part of the attack (you need a free hand to load a one-handed weapon). After a fight, you can spend 1 minute to recover half the ammunition (round down) you used in the fight; the rest is lost.

property.name: Loading

property.name: Vex
property.desc: If you hit a creature with this weapon and deal damage to the creature, you have Advantage on your next attack roll against that creature before the end of your next turn.

results.name: Plate Armor
results.desc: A plate armor.

results.name: Poison, Basic
results.desc: As a Bonus Action, you can use a vial of Basic Poison to coat one weapon or up to three pieces of ammunition. A creature that takes Piercing or Slashing damage from the poisoned weapon or ammunition takes an extra 1d4 Poison damage. Once applied, the poison retains potency for 1 minute or until its damage is dealt, whichever comes first.

results.name: Poisoner's Kit
results.desc: Ability: Intelligence. Utilize: Detect a poisoned object (DC 10). Craft: Basic Poison

results.name: Pole
results.desc: A Pole is 10 feet long. You can use it to touch something up to 10 feet away. If you must make a Strength (Athletics) check as part of a High or Long Jump, you can use the Pole to vault, giving yourself Advantage on the check.

results.name: Pony
results.desc: A small horse suitable for smaller riders and lighter loads.

results.name: Pot, Iron
results.desc: An Iron Pot holds up to 1 gallon.

results.name: Potion of Giant Strength
results.desc:
When you drink this potion, your Strength score changes for 1 hour. The type of giant determines the score (see the table below). The potion has no effect on you if your Strength is equal to or greater than that score.

This potion's transparent liquid has floating in it a sliver of light resembling a giant's fingernail.

| Potion                                    | Str. | Rarity    |
|-------------------------------------------|------|-----------|
| Potion of Giant Strength (hill)           | 21   | Uncommon  |
| Potion of Giant Strength (frost or stone) | 23   | Rare      |
| Potion of Giant Strength (fire)           | 25   | Rare      |
| Potion of Giant Strength (cloud)          | 27   | Very Rare |
| Potion of Giant Strength (storm)          | 29   | Legendary |

results.name: Potion of Healing
results.desc: This potion is a magic item. As a Bonus Action, you can drink it or administer it to another creature within 5 feet of yourself. The creature that drinks the magical red fluid in this vial regains 2d4 + 2 Hit Points.

results.name: Potions of Healing
results.desc:
You regain Hit Points when you drink this potion. The number of Hit Points depends on the potion's rarity, as shown in the table below.

Whatever its potency, the potion's red liquid glimmers when agitated.

| Potion                       | HP Regained | Rarity    |
|------------------------------|-------------|-----------|
| Potion of Healing            | 2d4 + 2     | Common    |
| Potion of Healing (greater)  | 4d4 + 4     | Uncommon  |
| Potion of Healing (superior) | 8d4 + 8     | Rare      |
| Potion of Healing (supreme)  | 10d4 + 20   | Very Rare |

results.name: Potter's Tools (10 GP)
results.desc: Ability: Intelligence. Utilize: Discern what a ceramic object held in the past 24 hours (DC 15). Craft: Jug, Lamp

results.name: Pouch
results.desc: A Pouch holds up to 6 pounds within one-fifth of a cubic foot.

results.name: Priest's Pack
results.desc: A Priest's Pack contains the following items: Backpack, Blanket, Holy Water, Lamp, 7 days of Rations, Robe, and Tinderbox.

results.name: Quarterstaff
results.desc: A quarterstaff.

property.name: Topple
property.desc: If you hit a creature with this weapon, you can force the creature to make a Constitution saving throw (DC 8 plus the ability modifier used to make the attack roll and your Proficiency Bonus). On a failed save, the creature has the Prone condition.

property.name: Versatile
property.desc: A Versatile weapon can be used with one or two hands. A damage value in parentheses appears with the property. The weapon deals that damage when used with two hands to make a melee attack.

results.name: Quiver
results.desc: A Quiver holds up to 20 Arrows.

results.name: Ram, Portable
results.desc: You can use a Portable Ram to break down doors. When doing so, you gain a +4 bonus to the Strength check. One other character can help you use the ram, giving you Advantage on this check.

results.name: Rapier
results.desc: A rapier.

property.name: Finesse
property.desc: When making an attack with a Finesse weapon, use your choice of your Strength or Dexterity modifier for the attack and damage rolls. You must use the same modifier for both rolls.

property.name: Vex
property.desc: If you hit a creature with this weapon and deal damage to the creature, you have Advantage on your next attack roll against that creature before the end of your next turn.

results.name: Rations
results.desc: Rations consist of travel-ready food, including jerky, dried fruit, hardtack, and nuts. See "Malnutrition" in "Rules Glossary" for the risks of not eating.

results.name: Ring Mail
results.desc: A ring mail.

results.name: Robe
results.desc: A Robe has vocational or ceremonial significance. Some events and locations admit only people wearing a Robe bearing certain colors or symbols.

results.name: Rope
results.desc: As a Utilize action, you can tie a knot with Rope if you succeed on a DC 10 Dexterity (Sleight of Hand) check. The Rope can be burst with a successful DC 20 Strength (Athletics) check. You can bind an unwilling creature with the Rope only if the creature has the Grappled, Incapacitated, or Restrained condition. If the creature's legs are bound, the creature has the Restrained condition until it escapes. Escaping the Rope requires the creature to make a successful DC 15 Dexterity (Acrobatics) check as an action.

results.name: Rowboat
results.desc: A small boat propelled by oars.

results.name: Sack
results.desc: A Sack holds up to 30 pounds within 1 cubic foot.

results.name: Saddle (Exotic)
results.desc: A saddle designed for unusual mounts, such as aquatic or flying creatures.

results.name: Saddle (Military)
results.desc: A saddle designed for combat, providing advantage on checks to remain mounted.

results.name: Saddle (Riding)
results.desc: A standard saddle for riding mounts.

results.name: Sailing Ship
results.desc: A large ship propelled by sails.

results.name: Scale Mail
results.desc: A scale mail.

results.name: Scholar's Pack
results.desc: A Scholar's Pack contains the following items: Backpack, Book, Ink, Ink Pen, Lamp, 10 flasks of Oil, 10 sheets of Parchment, and Tinderbox.

results.name: Scimitar
results.desc: A scimitar.

results.name: Smith's Tools (20 GP)
results.desc: Ability: Strength. Utilize: Pry open a door or container (DC 20). Craft: Any Melee weapon (except Club, Greatclub, Quarterstaff, and Whip), Medium armor (except Hide), Heavy armor, Ball Bearings, Bucket, Caltrops, Chain, Crowbar, Firearm Bullets, Grappling Hook, Iron Pot, Iron Spikes, Sling Bullets

results.name: Spear
results.desc: A spear.

property.name: Sap
property.desc: If you hit a creature with this weapon, that creature has Disadvantage on its next attack roll before the start of your next turn.

property.name: Thrown
property.desc: If a weapon has the Thrown property, you can throw the weapon to make a ranged attack, and you can draw that weapon as part of the attack. If the weapon is a Melee weapon, use the same ability modifier for the attack and damage rolls that you use for a melee attack with that weapon.

property.name: Versatile
property.desc: A Versatile weapon can be used with one or two hands. A damage value in parentheses appears with the property. The weapon deals that damage when used with two hands to make a melee attack.

results.name: Spell Scroll
results.desc: A Spell Scroll (Cantrip) or Spell Scroll (Level 1) is a magic item that bears the words of a cantrip or level 1 spell, respectively, determined by the scroll's creator. If the spell is on your class's spell list, you can read the scroll and cast the spell using its normal casting time and without providing any Material components. If the spell requires a saving throw or an attack roll, the spell save DC is 13, and the attack bonus is +5. The scroll disintegrates when the casting is completed.

results.name: Spikes, Iron
results.desc: Iron Spikes come in bundles of ten. As a Utilize action, you can use a blunt object, such as a Light Hammer, to hammer a spike into wood, earth, or a similar material. You can do so to jam a door shut or to then tie a Rope or Chain to the Spike.

results.name: Splint Armor
results.desc: A splint armor.

results.name: Spyglass
results.desc: Objects viewed through a Spyglass are magnified to twice their size.

results.name: String
results.desc: String is 10 feet long. You can tie a knot in it as a Utilize action.

results.name: Studded Leather Armor
results.desc: A studded leather armor.

results.name: Tent
results.desc: A Tent sleeps up to two Small or Medium creatures.

results.name: Thieves' Tools
results.desc: Ability: Dexterity. Utilize: Pick a lock (DC 15), or disarm a trap (DC 15)

results.name: Tinderbox
results.desc: A Tinderbox is a small container holding flint, fire steel, and tinder (usually dry cloth soaked in light oil) used to kindle a fire. Using it to light a Candle, Lamp, Lantern, or Torch—or anything else with exposed fuel—takes a Bonus Action. Lighting any other fire takes 1 minute.

results.name: Tinker's Tools (50 GP)
results.desc: Ability: Dexterity. Utilize: Assemble a Tiny item composed of scrap, which falls apart in 1 minute (DC 20). Craft: Musket, Pistol, Bell, Bullseye Lantern, Flask, Hooded Lantern, Hunting Trap, Lock, Manacles, Mirror, Shovel, Signal Whistle, Tinderbox

results.name: Torch
results.desc: A Torch burns for 1 hour, casting Bright Light in a 20-foot radius and Dim Light for an additional 20 feet. When you take the Attack action, you can attack with the Torch, using it as a Simple Melee weapon. On a hit, the target takes 1 Fire damage.

results.name: Trident
results.desc: A trident.

property.name: Thrown
property.desc: If a weapon has the Thrown property, you can throw the weapon to make a ranged attack, and you can draw that weapon as part of the attack. If the weapon is a Melee weapon, use the same ability modifier for the attack and damage rolls that you use for a melee attack with that weapon.

property.name: Versatile
property.desc: A Versatile weapon can be used with one or two hands. A damage value in parentheses appears with the property. The weapon deals that damage when used with two hands to make a melee attack.

results.name: Vial
results.desc: A Vial holds up to 4 ounces.

results.name: Wagon
results.desc: A four-wheeled vehicle pulled by horses, designed for heavy cargo transport.

results.name: War Pick
results.desc: A war pick.

property.name: Sap
property.desc: If you hit a creature with this weapon, that creature has Disadvantage on its next attack roll before the start of your next turn.

property.name: Versatile
property.desc: A Versatile weapon can be used with one or two hands. A damage value in parentheses appears with the property. The weapon deals that damage when used with two hands to make a melee attack.

results.name: Warhammer
results.desc: A warhammer.

property.name: Push
property.desc: If you hit a creature with this weapon, you can push the creature up to 10 feet straight away from yourself if it is Large or smaller.

property.name: Versatile
property.desc: A Versatile weapon can be used with one or two hands. A damage value in parentheses appears with the property. The weapon deals that damage when used with two hands to make a melee attack.

results.name: Warhorse
results.desc: A horse trained for combat and carrying heavy loads.

results.name: Warship
results.desc: A heavily armed ship designed for naval combat.

results.name: Waterskin
results.desc: A Waterskin holds up to 4 pints. If you don't drink sufficient water, you risk dehydration (see "Rules Glossary").

results.name: Weaver's Tools (1 GP)
results.desc: Ability: Dexterity. Utilize: Mend a tear in clothing (DC 10), or sew a Tiny design (DC 10). Craft: Padded Armor, Basket, Bedroll, Blanket, Fine Clothes, Net, Robe, Rope, Sack, String, Tent, Traveler's Clothes

results.name: Whip
results.desc: A whip.

property.name: Finesse
property.desc: When making an attack with a Finesse weapon, use your choice of your Strength or Dexterity modifier for the attack and damage rolls. You must use the same modifier for both rolls.

property.name: Reach
property.desc: A Reach weapon adds 5 feet to your reach when you attack with it, as well as when determining your reach for Opportunity Attacks with it.

property.name: Slow
property.desc: If you hit a creature with this weapon and deal damage to it, you can reduce its Speed by 10 feet until the start of your next turn. If the creature is hit more than once by weapons that have this property, the Speed reduction doesn't exceed 10 feet.

results.name: Woodcarver's Tools (1 GP)
results.desc: Ability: Dexterity. Utilize: Carve a pattern in wood (DC 10). Craft: Club, Greatclub, Quarterstaff, Ranged weapons (except Pistol, Musket, and Sling), Arcane Focus, Arrows, Bolts, Druidic Focus, Ink Pen, Needles
